info.description: Photoshop v2 beta API Server for Adobe DI Arts.
info.title: Photoshop v2 beta API endpoints

tags.description: Photoshop APIs for image processing operations.
tags.name: Photoshop operations

tags.description: Storage URL regeneration - Unauthenticated redirect endpoint.
tags.name: Storage operations

tags.description: APIs for retrieving job status information.
tags.name: Job status

post.description: Creates an artboard from the provided source. The request is processed asynchronously; use the Get status - v2 endpoint to poll for completion and outputs.

requestBody.description: Request body containing the artboard source and output configuration.

value.message: Validation failed
OAuth token is not valid
The user is not entitled to call this service
Validation failed
The Service is experiencing high traffic. Please retry after a brief wait.
There was a problem while attempting to perform the operation. Please try again.

post.description: Creates or edits a composite from the provided image, layers, and options. The request is processed asynchronously; use the Get status - v2 endpoint to poll for completion and outputs.

requestBody.description: Request body containing the source image, layer configuration, and output options.

value.message: Validation failed

post.description: Applies edits and adjustments to an image (e.g. auto tone, layer edits). The request is processed asynchronously; use the Get status - v2 endpoint to poll for completion and outputs.

requestBody.description: Request body containing the image source, edits to apply, and output configuration.

requestBody.description: Request body containing actions or UXP script configuration, optional resources, and output options.

post.summary: Execute Photoshop actions, scripts, and transformations

post.description: Generates a manifest (e.g. XMP or JSON) for the given input image. The request is processed asynchronously; use the Get status - v2 endpoint to poll for completion and outputs.

requestBody.description: Request body containing the image source and manifest output configuration.

post.summary: Generate a manifest for given input image

get.description: Publicly accessible endpoint that returns a temporary redirect (302) to a pre-signed S3 URL. No authentication required as the pre-signed URL itself contains authorization.

parameters.description: URN of the storage resource for which to obtain a pre-signed GET URL.
parameters.name: urn

302.description: Temporary Redirect To Pre-signed S3 GET URL

get.summary: Redirect to pre-signed GET URL with remaining TTL

get.description: Retrieves the current status and details of a specific job including metadata, outputs, and processing information.

parameters.description: Unique identifier for the job to retrieve status information.
parameters.name: jobId

value.message: Validation failed
OAuth token is not valid
Job not found
The user is not entitled to call this service
The Service is experiencing high traffic. Please retry after a brief wait.
There was a problem while attempting to perform the operation. Please try again.

ActionResource.description: List of Photoshop actions. Can be .atn files or inline actionJSON.

actions.description: List of Photoshop actions. Can be .atn files or inline actionJSON.

additionalContents.description: List of additional resources. These images, js, brushes can be referenced in inline actionJSON or in UXP using placeholders `__ADDITIONAL_CONTENT_0__`, `__ADDITIONAL_CONTENT_1__`, etc. based on their array index.

brushes.description: List of brush resources. External references only.

patterns.description: List of pattern resources. External references only.

ActionsOptions.description: Options configuration for the actions execution. At least one of `actions` or `uxp` is required.

AdditionalContentResource.description: List of additional resources. These images, js, brushes can be referenced in inline actionJSON or in UXP using placeholders `__ADDITIONAL_CONTENT_0__`, `__ADDITIONAL_CONTENT_1__`, etc. based on their array index.

AdditionalFont.description: Array of custom fonts needed in this document.

AdjustmentLayer.description: Adjustment layer for applying image adjustments like brightness, contrast, hue/saturation, etc.

Anchor.description: Anchor point coordinates for transformations and positioning.

bottom.description: Bottom boundary of the text area.

left.description: Left boundary of the text area.

right.description: Right boundary of the text area.

top.description: Top boundary of the text area.

AreaFrame.description: Area frame for defining text boundaries and wrapping.

constrainCrop.description: Whether to constrain crop the straightened image to remove blank edges.

uprightMode.description: Upright mode options for auto straighten.

uprightModeOrDefault.description: Upright mode options for auto straighten.

type.description: Adjustment type. Allowed values: hue_saturation, brightness_contrast, exposure, color_balance.

BaseAdjustment.description: Adjustment settings to apply. Must specify exactly one adjustment type (brightness_contrast, hue_saturation, exposure, or color_balance).

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Defaults to false when adding layers. Optional for edits.

isLocked.description: Whether the layer is locked. Defaults to false when adding layers. Optional for edits.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

transformMode.description: Transform mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

BaseLayer.description: Array of layer edits to be applied.

opacity.description: Opacity percentage for the blend effect. Range: 0-100. Defaults to 100 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

BlendOptions.description: Blend options for layer effects, including opacity settings.

Bounds.description: The bounds to crop the document to.

brightness.description: The adjustment layer's brightness. Range: -150 to 150. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

contrast.description: The adjustment layer's contrast. Range: -150 to 150. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

BrushResource.description: List of brush resources. External references only.

CharacterStyleRange.description: Character style range defining styling for specific text ranges.

Cmyk.description: CMYK color values with cyan, magenta, yellow, and black components.

whiteBalance.description: White balance adjustment. Range: 2000 to 50000 Kelvin.

highlightLevels.description: Array of 3 integers for highlight levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

items.description: Array of 3 integers for highlight levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

midtoneLevels.description: Array of 3 integers for midtone levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

items.description: Array of 3 integers for midtone levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

preserveLuminosity.description: Whether to preserve luminosity. Defaults to true when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

shadowLevels.description: Array of 3 integers for shadow levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

items.description: Array of 3 integers for shadow levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

images.description: List of input images for the artboard. Each image must specify a source and bounds.

outputs.description: List of output asset details. Each output specifies destination and output options.

creativeCloudProjectId.description: The Creative Cloud project ID. Must be a valid URN starting with 'urn:aaid:sc:'.

CreativeCloudFileIdResourceInput.description: Creative Cloud file ID resource input. References a resource via Creative Cloud file ID (URN).

creativeCloudFileId.description: The file ID of the asset in Creative Cloud. Must start with 'urn:aaid' (case-insensitive).

CreativeCloudResourceInput.description: Creative Cloud resource input. References a resource via Creative Cloud path.

creativeCloudPath.description: The path to the asset in Creative Cloud.

creativeCloudProjectId.description: The Creative Cloud project ID. Must be a valid URN starting with 'urn:aaid:sc:'.

hide.description: When true, hides pixels outside the crop bounds (non-destructive). When false, permanently deletes pixels outside the crop bounds (destructive). Defaults to false.

Crop.description: Options for cropping a document, specifying the bounds to crop to.

CustomIccProfile.description: Custom ICC profile with user-provided profile file.

name.description: Custom ICC profile name. Provide a descriptive name.

shouldIncludeChildren.description: Whether to include child layers in the deletion.

Destination.description: Destination for output files. Can be either a URL with optional storage type or a Creative Cloud path.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the dimension. 'pixels_unit' for absolute pixel measurements, 'percent_unit' for percentage-based scaling, 'distance_unit' for physical measurements using this formula: Physical Size (points) = Pixels × (72 ÷ DPI).

value.description: The value of the dimension. Must be greater than or equal to 0.

DimensionMeasurement.description: Represents a dimension measurement for width or height with appropriate units.

Document.description: Represents the editable document structure, including resize, crop and trim options. Each field corresponds to a specific type of document edit operation.

EditOperation.description: Edit operation for modifying existing layer properties.

layers.description: Array of layer edits to be applied.

Edits.description: Edits to be applied to the input asset.

error_code.description: The error code for this specific validation error.

errors.description: List of detailed validation errors when multiple errors occur. This field is optional and only populated when there are multiple validation errors.

message.description: Human-readable string describing this specific validation error.

ErrorResponse.description:
Error response containing error code, message, and optional list of validation errors.

Error Code Reference:
| Error Code                    | Message                             |
| ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------|
|                               |                                     |
| 401013                        | OAuth token is not valid            |
| validation_error              | Validation failed                   |
| unsupported_method            | Method not allowed                  |
| invalid_content_type          | Unsupported media type              |
| unknown_job_id                | Job not found                       |
| unauthorized_forbidden        | The quota for the calling user has exhausted OR
|                               | The Service is experiencing high traffic. Please retry after a brief wait OR
|                               | The user is not entitled to call this service OR
|                               | The user is currently blocked by the admin OR
|                               | The user is having an invalid subscription OR
|                               | The user is blocked due to a violation OR
|                               | The user is having an invalid scope |
| unauthorized_legal_reasons    | The user is unauthorized due to geo ip blocking failure OR
|                               | The user is unauthorized due to user profile region failure from floodgate |
| runtime_error                 | There was a problem while attempting to perform the operation. Please try again. |
| invalid_json                  | The request payload is having invalid JSON (fallback) |

exposureValue.description: The layer's exposure value. Range: -20 to 20. Defaults to 0.0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

gammaCorrection.description: The layer's gamma correction value. Range: 0.01 to 9.99. Defaults to 1.0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

offset.description: The layer's offset value. Range: -0.5 to 0.5. Defaults to 0.0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

FileResourceInput.description: The resource input for the image. Must be a valid FileResourceInput subtype.

postScriptName.description: PostScript name of the font for precise identification.

Font.description: Font definition with name and PostScript name.

FontColor.description: Font color definition supporting RGB and CMYK color models.

additionalFonts.description: Array of custom fonts needed in this document.

defaultFont.description: The full postscript name of the font to be used as the global default for the document.

missingFontStrategy.description: Action to take if there are missing fonts.

extractSmartObjectData.description: Extract embedded smart objects and include pre-signed URLs in the manifest. Only applies to embedded (non-linked) smart objects. Default is false.

includeXmp.description: Include the XMP metadata in the response.

maximumThumbnailDepth.description: Depth for layer renditions. If provided, must be greater than or equal to 0. 0 signifies no limit.

outputs.description: List of output destinations for the manifest.

trimToTransparency.description: Trim the layer to remove the transparent pixels.

GroupLayer.description: Group layer for organizing layers hierarchically.

validityPeriod.description: Validity period in seconds. Minimum: 60 seconds (1 minute). Maximum: 86400 seconds (1 day).

colorize.description: Whether to colorize the layer. When true, LocalRange cannot be used in any adjustment. Defaults to false when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

HueSaturation.description: Hue/Saturation adjustment settings. When colorize is true, LocalRange cannot be used. When colorize is false, LocalRange can only be used for non-master channels (reds, yellows, greens, cyans, blues, magentas).

hue.description: The hue adjustment value. When colorize=false: -180 to 180. When colorize=true: 0 to 360. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

lightness.description: The lightness adjustment value. When colorize=false: -100 to 100. When colorize=true: 0 to 100. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

saturation.description: The saturation adjustment value. When colorize=false: -100 to 100. When colorize=true: 0 to 100. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

HueSaturationAdjustment.description: Array of hue/saturation adjustments. For master channel, LocalRange is not applicable.

type.description: Type of ICC profile. 'standard' for predefined profiles, 'custom' for user-provided profiles.

IccProfile.description: ICC profile configuration for color management.

Image.description: The image input, which contains a source field of type ResourceInput.

ImageInput.description: Image input configuration. Can be either a source image or parameters to create a new image.

depth.description: Bit depth options for image processing.

fill.description: Type of fill for the background layer.

ImageWithBounds.description: List of input images for the artboard. Each image must specify a source and bounds.

InlineContentResourceInput.description: Inline content resource input. Allows embedding content directly in the request.

content.description: Inline content as string (for scripts, JSON, or other text-based content).

contentType.description: MIME type of the content. Optional but recommended for proper processing.

JpegExportOptions.description: Jpeg Export options for the image.

Layer.description: Image layer for adding raster images to the document.

presets.description: List of preset inputs to apply.

LightroomEdits.description: Lightroom edit adjustments including XMP, presets, and all adjustment parameters.

mediaType.description: Supported media types for edit output.

LightroomOutput.description: Export options for a single output.

LightroomResourceInput.description: Lightroom resource input. References a resource via Lightroom path.

lightroomPath.description: The path to the asset in Lightroom.

beginRamp.description: The beginning of the ramp (feather start). Range: 0-360 degrees.

beginSustain.description: The beginning of the sustain (full effect start). Range: 0-360 degrees.

channelId.description: Channel for local range color adjustments.

endRamp.description: The end of the ramp (feather end). Range: 0-360 degrees.

endSustain.description: The end of the sustain (full effect end). Range: 0-360 degrees.

LocalRange.description: Local range settings for targeted color adjustments. Defines the hue range boundaries for the adjustment.

compression.description: PNG compression levels, from no compression to maximum compression. Values follow zlib/libpng standards.

mediaType.description: Supported media types for manifest output.

digest.description: Fingerprint/digest of the mask for dictionary lookup.

Mask.description: Mask input for XMP operations. Contains source file reference and digest for dictionary lookup.

NoiseReduction.description: Noise reduction settings for image editing.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Defaults to false when adding layers. Optional for edits.

isLocked.description: Whether the layer is locked. Defaults to false when adding layers. Optional for edits.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

transformMode.description: Transform mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

horizontal.description: Horizontal offset in pixels. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

vertical.description: Vertical offset in pixels. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

Operation.description: Layer operation settings including placement, delete and edit operations.

ParagraphStyleRange.description: Paragraph style range defining paragraph formatting for specific text ranges.

PatternResource.description: List of pattern resources. External references only.

layers.description: Layers to include in the output.

items.description: Layers to include in the output.

maxWidth.description: Maximum width constraint in pixels. Must be >= 0. If specified and (width > maxWidth OR documentWidth > maxWidth), the output will be constrained to maxWidth.

scriptOutputPattern.description: Pattern for matching script output files in the UXP output directory. Supports both exact filenames and glob patterns. Examples: 'output.json' (matches single specific file), '*.json' (matches all JSON files), 'result-*.png' (matches result-1.png, result-2.png, etc.). Files are filtered based on the mediaType of this output definition. Only files with extensions matching the mediaType will be included. When a pattern matches multiple files, one output entry is created per file. When present, skips normal rendering/export and uses matched files instead. Output parameters like quality, compression, width, and height are ignored when this field is present. Only applicable for /v2/execute-actions endpoint. Nullable.

PhotoshopOutput.description: Export options for a single output.

isEnabled.description: Whether the pixel mask is enabled. Defaults to true when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

isLinked.description: Whether the pixel mask is linked to the layer. Defaults to true when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

PixelMask.description: Pixel mask settings for layer operations, including source input and pixel mask properties.

type.description: Type of placement operation (below, into, top, bottom, above).

Placement.description: Placement settings for positioning elements with alignment and insertion point.

PngExportOptions.description: Png Export options for the image.

compression.description: PNG compression levels, from no compression to maximum compression. Values follow zlib/libpng standards.
PNG compression levels, from no compression to maximum compression. Values follow zlib/libpng standards.

constrainProportions.description: Whether to constrain proportions during resizing.

rasterize.description: Whether to rasterize the image during resizing.

resample.description: The resampling method to use when resizing.

scaleStyles.description: Whether to scale styles during resizing.

Resize.description: Options for resizing a document, including width, height, resolution, resample type, and additional flags.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for resolution. 'density_unit' represents pixel density measurements like DPI (dots per inch) or PPI (pixels per inch).

value.description: The value of the resolution. Must be greater than or equal to 0.

ResolutionMeasurement.description: Represents a resolution measurement with density unit.

ResourceInput.description: Source for the UXP script. Can be external file reference or inline script content. UXP scripts can use the placeholder `__UXP_OUTPUT_PATH__` which will be replaced at runtime with the directory path for script output files. Example usage: `const outputPath = '__UXP_OUTPUT_PATH__'; const outputFile = path.join(outputPath, 'uxpOutput.json');`.

Rgb.description: RGB color values with red, green, and blue components.

Skew.description: Skew transformation settings for horizontal and vertical distortion.

SmartObject.description: Smart object settings and file reference.

SmartObjectFile.description: File reference for the smart object.

SmartObjectLayer.description: Smart object layer for embedding external files or vector graphics.

SolidColor.description: Solid color definition using RGB values.

SolidColorLayer.description: Fill layer for adding solid color layer.

StandardIccProfile.description: Standard ICC profile with predefined profile names.

name.description: Standard ICC profile names for color management.

characterStyles.description: Character styles applied to text ranges.

paragraphStyles.description: Paragraph styles applied to text ranges.

Text.description: Text content and formatting settings for text layers.

TextLayer.description: Text layer for adding and editing text content in the document.

Transform.description: Transformation applied to the smart object or layer.

trimUpon.description: The basis for the trim operation (background or transparent).

Trim.description: Options for trimming a document, specifying the basis for the trim operation.

url.description: Pre-signed URL for external storage. Must be HTTPS.

UrlResourceInput.description: URL resource input. References a resource via a pre-signed URL.

url.description: The pre-signed URL of the resource.

UxpResource.description: An UXP plugin script that can be executed.

error_code.description: The error code for this specific validation error.

message.description: Human-readable string describing this specific validation error.

ValidationError.description: Represents a single validation error with error code and message.

masks.description: List of mask inputs. Each mask contains a source file reference and digest for dictionary lookup.

orientation.description: XMP orientation values following EXIF/TIFF specification.

XmpInput.description: XMP metadata input for the edit operation.
